title: Oil prices surge: WTI up 7% to $89.74, Brent up 5.8% to $95.59 on Iran ship seizure
snippet: Oil prices spiked with WTI climbing 7% to $89.74 and Brent rising 5.8% to $95.59 after US Navy seized Iranian ship and complete halt in Hormuz tanker traffic.
tag_reason: New oil price data for April 19 — significant surge driven by Touska seizure and Hormuz halt
